name: ExclusiveTest
title: Exclusive Test (2.9.1 - 1.0.1)
description: HL7-defined code system of concepts that define if a test should be a specific event with no other tests to be performed with this test, or not, or other special circumstances.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in Master Files (OM1 segment) to characterize observations in a master of such orderables.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: In some cases, this test should be only exclusively with like tests (examples are cyto or pathology)
concept.definition: In some cases, this test should be only exclusively with like tests (examples are cyto or pathology)

property.valueString: When  D is specified for this field, using field OM1-49 determines how tests must be grouped together.  Tests within the same Diagnostic Service Sector may be on the same requisition, and therefore in the same message

concept.display: This test can be included with any number of other tests
concept.definition: This test can be included with any number of other tests

property.valueString: Default -.will be assumed when this field is empty
